scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run build:watch --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.deploy:client: npm run build --workspace=client && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:server: npm run build --workspace=server && fly deploy --config server/fly.toml
